creator: sada@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
These are Netscape Version 4.06 Browsers' ports
	with Japnese resources.

	This archive includes 3 ports: netscape-fonts,
	netscape4-communicator, and netscape4-navigator.
	Netscape-fonts is a depended port for japanese/netscape4-*,
	so you should install beforehand or extract at the directry
	``/usr/ports/japanese''.

	This port's explanation (written in Japanese):
	 <URL:http://www.rr.iij4u.or.jp/~sada/netscape.html>

	Please remove obsolete port: japanese/netscape4
